name: 整数与有理数
subject: math
curriculum_points: The derivative interpreted as gradient function and as rate of change.
Derivative of f(x)=ax^n is f'(x)=anx^{n-1}, n∈ℤ. The derivative of functions of the form f(x)=ax^n+bx^{n-1}+... where all exponents are integers.
Tangents and normals at a given point, and their equations.
The second derivative. Use of both forms of notation, d²y/dx² and f''(x). Graphical behaviour of functions, including the relationship between the graphs of f, f' and f''.

excerpts.text: The derivative interpreted as gradient function and as rate of change.
Derivative of f(x)=ax^n is f'(x)=anx^{n-1}, n∈ℤ. The derivative of functions of the form f(x)=ax^n+bx^{n-1}+... where all exponents are integers.
Tangents and normals at a given point, and their equations.
The second derivative. Use of both forms of notation, d²y/dx² and f''(x). Graphical behaviour of functions, including the relationship between the graphs of f, f' and f''.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「整数与有理数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：The derivative interpreted as gradient function and as rate of change.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Derivative of f(x)=ax^n is f'(x)=anx^{n-1}, n∈ℤ. The derivative of functions of … 对理解「整数与有理数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
